Manually assigns a 2.4GHz channel to a specific AP
Manually assigns a 5GHz channel to a specific AP
Manually sets 2.4GHz transmit power level on a specific AP
Manually sets 5GHz transmit power level on a specific AP
Shuts down only the 2.4GHz radio on a specific AP
Shuts down only the 5GHz radio on a specific AP
Sets AP to local mode — all traffic tunnelled back to the WLC
Sets AP to FlexConnect mode — local switching is possible
Sets AP to monitor mode — passive scanning, no client associations
Assigns a site tag to a specific AP
Assigns a policy tag to a specific AP
Assigns an RF tag to a specific AP
Disables the LED indicator on a specific AP
Sets the AP join priority — lower number means higher priority

WLAN Configuration.desc: Creates a WLAN with the given profile name, numeric ID, and SSID

WLAN Configuration.cmd: wlan <name> <id> <ssid> security wpa wpa2 ciphers aes
WLAN Configuration.desc: Configures WPA2-AES security on a WLAN

WLAN Configuration.cmd: wlan <name> <id> <ssid> security wpa psk set-key ascii 0 <passphrase>
WLAN Configuration.desc: Sets a WPA2-PSK passphrase on a WLAN
Administratively disables (brings down) a WLAN by ID
Administratively enables a WLAN by ID
Enables SSID broadcast so the network is visible to scanning clients
Hides the SSID from beacon frames (closed network)
Deletes a WLAN configuration by its numeric ID
Configures WPA3 SAE (Simultaneous Authentication of Equals) on the WLAN
Enables 802.11 band steering to prefer 5GHz for dual-band clients
Enables Cisco Compatible Extensions for Aironet IE support
Sets the DTIM interval for 2.4GHz — affects power save client wake behaviour

WLAN Configuration.cmd: policy <POLICY-PROFILE> - bind WLAN to policy profile
no policy <POLICY-PROFILE> - unbind WLAN from policy profile
security wpa psk set-key ascii <PASSWORD> - configure WPA2 PSK
security wpa akm psk - enable PSK AKM
security wpa akm dot1x - enable 802.1X AKM
security dot1x authentication-list <AAA-LIST> - bind AAA list for 802.1X
security wpa akm sae - enable WPA3 SAE
security wpa sae password <PASSWORD> - configure SAE password
security wpa wpa3 - enable WPA3 mode
security wpa akm suite-b-192 - enable Suite‑B 192‑bit mode
no security wpa akm - disable all AKMs
security mac-filtering list <ACL> - enable MAC filtering
wireless profile policy <PROFILE> - create policy profile
wlan <WLAN-NAME> - bind WLAN to policy profile
flexconnect vlan <VLAN-ID> - set Flex VLAN override
flexconnect ap <AP-NAME> vlan <VLAN-ID> - AP‑specific VLAN override
no mobility anchor <IP> - remove mobility anchor
mobility tunnel mode <L2/L3> - set mobility tunnel mode
multicast mcast-to-unicast - convert multicast to unicast
no multicast mcast-to-unicast - disable multicast conversion
security pmf required - enable mandatory PMF
security pmf optional - enable optional PMF

Tags & Profiles.desc: Creates or enters a site tag configuration
Associates an AP join profile with the site tag
Creates or enters a policy tag configuration
Maps a WLAN to a wireless policy profile within a policy tag
Creates or enters an RF tag configuration
Associates a 2.4GHz RF policy with this RF tag
Associates a 5GHz RF policy with this RF tag
Creates or enters a wireless policy profile
Associates a data VLAN with the wireless policy profile
Creates or enters an AP join profile

Client Management.desc: Full client details: IP, VLAN, AP, BSSID, RSSI, SNR, data rates
Force-deauthenticates and disconnects a specific wireless client
Traffic and session statistics for a specific client
Lists all clients currently associated to a specific AP
Lists all clients currently associated to a specific WLAN
Adds a specific client MAC to the exclusion (blacklist)
Removes a client entry from the exclusion list
Displays band steering statistics: steered clients and steering failures

RRM.desc: Displays RRM RF grouping info and identifies the RF group leader
Triggers an immediate RRM channel assignment update for all 2.4GHz radios
Triggers an immediate RRM channel assignment update for all 5GHz radios
Triggers an immediate RRM transmit power update for 2.4GHz
Triggers an immediate RRM transmit power update for 5GHz
Auto-RF report for all 2.4GHz radios: channel, power, coverage overlap
Auto-RF report for all 5GHz radios: channel, power, coverage overlap

RRM.cmd: ap dot11 5ghz rrm channel dca remove <channel>
RRM.desc: Removes a channel from the DCA candidate list for 5GHz
Enables logging of all RRM-initiated channel changes

Security & AAA.desc: Enables the AAA security framework — must be configured before any AAA commands

Security & AAA.cmd: aaa authentication login <list-name> group radius local
Security & AAA.desc: Creates an authentication list using RADIUS with local fallback

Security & AAA.cmd: aaa authentication dot1x default group radius
Security & AAA.desc: Configures 802.1X authentication to use a RADIUS server group
Sets RADIUS server IP with standard authentication and accounting ports
Sets the RADIUS shared secret for this server entry
Displays all configured AAA servers and their connection status
Displays RADIUS transaction statistics and error counts
Enables MAC address filtering on the WLC
Displays the MAC filter list and allowed/denied entries

mDNS & AP Mesh.desc: Enables the mDNS Service Discovery gateway for policy-based mDNS bridging
Applies an mDNS service policy for incoming mDNS advertisements
Displays mDNS gateway status and number of learned services
Shows all services discovered and cached by the mDNS gateway
Displays mesh neighbour relationships for all mesh-capable APs
Shows the active mesh tree and path metrics for all mesh APs

mDNS & AP Mesh.cmd: ap name <ap-name> mesh backhaul rate auto
mDNS & AP Mesh.desc: Sets the mesh backhaul data rate to automatic on a specific AP
Displays mesh link statistics: SNR, packet counts, and backhaul rates

Diagnostics.desc: Enables detailed per-client debugging for a specific MAC address
Disables per-client debugging for a specific MAC address
Displays the contents of the syslog buffer
ICMP ping from the WLC management interface
Traces the network path from the WLC to a destination IP
Shows CDP neighbour information as reported by joined APs
Shows LLDP neighbour information as reported by joined APs
Shows AP firmware image version and download status for all APs
Pre-downloads the staged AP firmware image to all APs
Swaps the primary and backup AP firmware images on all APs

Diagnostics.cmd: show wireless stats ap join detail ap-name <name>
Diagnostics.desc: Detailed join statistics for a specific AP — useful for troubleshooting CAPWAP failures
Displays CAPWAP client connection details from the AP perspective

Config Management.desc: Saves the running config to NVRAM — persists across reboots
Saves the running config to startup config
Erases the startup config — takes effect on next reload
Schedules an automatic reload after the specified number of minutes
Backs up the running config to a TFTP server
Restores a running config from a TFTP server

tree # show directory tree.desc: # push directory to stack and change into it
# return to previous directory from stack

more file # paginated viewer.desc: # find files modified in last day

ip neigh # ARP table.cmd: ethtool -s eth0 speed 100 duplex full autoneg off

ss -s # socket summary.cmd: nmcli device wifi connect SSID password pass

ufw disable # disable firewall.cmd: ufw allow proto tcp from any to any port 80

brctl show # show bridges.cmd: ip link add bond0 type bond

zfs list # list datasets.cmd: zfs send dataset@snap | zfs receive backup

System.desc: Shows system hostname and OS metadata
Shows system uptime and load averages

Networking.desc: Adds an IP address to an interface
Deletes an IP address from an interface

Diagnostics.desc: Shows logs for a specific service
Shows kernel ring buffer with timestamps
Traces system calls for a process
Traces library calls for a process
Shows block devices with filesystem info

Capture Filters.desc: Captures packets to or from a specific IP
Captures packets from a specific source IP
Captures packets to a specific destination IP
Captures packets on a specific port
Captures TCP packets on a port
Captures UDP packets on a port
Captures packets to/from a MAC address
Captures packets from a MAC address
Captures packets to a MAC address
Captures packets larger than a size
Captures packets smaller than a size

TShark.desc: Loads TLS key log for decryption

Routing.desc: Displays route for a specific prefix

esxcli network ip route ipv6 list

esxcli storage core path stats get -p <path>
